summary: Find every stale version, package name, header, and pin across the three TN repos

result.inventory:
Two line-number conflicts resolved against the working tree (llms.txt name already flipped, README example block sits at 313-326, kafka.ts:140 confirmed `"tn-protocol"`, web pyproject URLs match the real `cyaxios/tn-proto-org` remote). Merged inventory follows.

# Unified drift inventory — 0.6.0a1 sweep (merged from 4 surveys, deduplicated)

Surveyed: `C:\codex\tn\tn_proto` @ abd1806 (feat/wallet-sync-two-way-equivocation), `C:\codex\tn\tn_proto_web` (main), `C:\codex\tn\tn_skills` @ d9f0692 (main). Tracked files only.

**Standing rules for the fix pass (apply before any bulk sed):**
- R1. Delete `tn_proto_web\.claude\worktrees\agent-a209eff9589a45455\` (untracked stale clone with old pins); exclude `tn_proto\.claude\worktrees\*` and `tn_proto\.worktrees\*` (pre-rename copies, not release inputs).
- R2. Exclude from bulk rename: all `CHANGELOG.md` history entries; dated audit docs (`tn_proto\DX_FIXES.md:1,4`, `docs\superpowers\RELEASE_0_4_3a1.md:20,59,85`, `docs\cli-test-plans\PARITY-connection.md:9,249,307`, `MATRIX.md:56`, `absorb.md:167`, `docs\release-triage-2026-06-09.md:192`, `_overnight\REPORT.md:192`, `docs\spec\discrepancies.md:171`; web `docs\E2E_WORKFLOWS_0_4_3a1.md`, `docs\CLI_RECEIVE_PARITY.md`, `docs\architecture\design-oo-build-out.md`, `docs\superpowers\*`, `MERGE_NOTES.md:51,64`, `HANDOVER.md:513,631,643`, `scripts\cleanup_prealpha_0_4_3a1.py`; skills `WALKTHROUGH.md:196,303,304,640,660`, `CHANGELOG.md:272-273,304`); historical behavior-callout comments citing "tn-protocol 0.4.3a1/0.5.0a2" (web `src\allocate_worker.py:58`, `routes_inbox.py:198`, `routes_sync.py:53,136,181,193,276,321,815`, `routes_account_inbox.py:44,189`, `vault_publisher.py:252`, `routes_pending_claims.py:226,252,388`).
- R3. Data artifacts, never edit: `tn_skills\_lab\exhaust\agents\out\rt-codex.txt`, `_lab\locator\classifier_cache.json`, `_lab\locator\runs\v2-rule2.json`, `v2-rule2-classified.json`.
- R4. Generated trees are fixed by rebuild, not sed: `tn_skills\plugin\dist\**` (~187 refs incl. `claude-code\.claude-plugin\plugin.json:3`), `tn_proto_web\static\dashboard\vendor\tnproto-sdk-core.mjs`, `static\wasm\tn_wasm_bg.wasm`, `worker_s\src\tn_wasm\tn_wasm_bg.wasm`, `tn_proto\crypto\tn-wasm\pkg*\package.json`, `ts-sdk\package-lock.json`, `python\build\lib\**`, `dist-wheelhouse\`.

# (a) DECISION list for the owner

| ID | Decision | Recommendation |
|---|---|---|
| D2 | Crypto version axis: do tn-btn/tn-core join 0.6.0a1? (tn_proto pyproject:64-65+54-57, both crypto pyprojects:7, web Dockerfile:15-16, web ci.yml:59-60) | Bump both to 0.6.0a1, floors `>=0.6.0a1,<0.7` — restores the stated same-axis policy and fixes the 0.5.1a2→0.5.0a4 regression; without it a tn-proto 0.6.0a1 with new floors is uninstallable. |
| D3 | Vault `tn-proto-org` version (web pyproject:7, package.json:3) | Ride the train: 0.6.0a1 / 0.6.0-alpha.4-style lockstep; cheap and kills a recurring "which version is the vault" question. |
| D4 | Publish-truth wording for every install claim (npm unpublished, TestPyPI name flip) | Flip all names to tn-proto now; mark npm rows "(in tree; npm publish pending)"; pip snippets carry `-i https://test.pypi.org/simple/ --extra-index-url https://pypi.org/simple/`; verify each at release. |
| D5 | `@tnproto/sdk` adapter-subsystem import migration (web items 94-100) | Defer from this sweep; when done, accept BOTH specifiers in validator/runner (stored adapters were minted against the old name) and flip the generator to tn-proto. |
| D6 | Vendored `tnproto-sdk-core.mjs` filename (+~15 importers) | Keep the filename, rebuild contents from 0.6.0a1 ts-sdk — zero importer churn. |
| D7 | tn-skills tag policy (manifest.yaml:2, marketplace.json:12, three `gh release download v0.5.1a1` refs) | Cut v0.6.0a1 to match the SDK minor; update download refs after tagging. |
| D8 | TS User-Agent scheme (4 divergent literals) | One shared helper emitting `tn-proto-ts/<pkg version>` (mirrors Python's dynamic `tn-proto/<version>`); then update PARITY-connection.md:95. |
| D9 | regression-crawl.yml pins (0.4.x baseline) | Migrate to `tn-proto>=0.6.0a1,<0.7` post-publish — a frozen 0.4.x baseline no longer tests the shipped line. |
| D10 | Wire/ops defaults: kafka.ts:140 clientId `"tn-protocol"`; web logger namespaces `tnproto-org.*` | Rename kafka clientId to `"tn-proto"` (cross-SDK parity, alpha break acceptable); KEEP logger namespaces (log-filter breakage, zero user value). |
| D11 | Extension: (a) manifest version 0.5.0 own axis; (b) `tnproto.org` hardcoded origins (manifest.json:32, popup.js:166, background.js:773) + mirror-domain prose refs | (a) leave on ext-v axis this sweep; (b) separate small PR adding tn-proto.org to the allowlist while keeping tnproto.org during transition; confirm the industry-agents mirror exists on tn-proto.org before sedding prose. |
| D12 | WebAuthn rp_id `"tnproto.org"` (registration_flow.js:37 + fixtures) | Leave untouched — changing it orphans every existing passkey; needs its own migration story, fully out of sweep scope. |
| D13 | CHANGELOG authoring ×3 (tn_proto, web, tn_skills incl. 0.5.1a1 backfill) | Owner writes the 0.6.0a1 entries at tag time; newest-on-top, `[skip ci]` per release flow. |
| D14 | llms.txt rewrite (lines 7,159-161; phantom `tn-proto-web` package) | Fold into the already-queued llms.txt rewrite; fix line 161 to name the real browser bundle (`dist/browser.mjs` / tn-wasm pkg-web). |
| D15 | Databricks notebooks: pin bumps vs narrative | Sed the pins + `_imv` now, RERUN all notebooks against the published 0.6.0a1 wheel (docs methodology), rewrite 0.4.0a1 narrative during the rerun. |
| D16 | "In 0.4 / 0.3 surface" framing in prompts/manifest | Rewrite version-free ("since 0.4", "current surface"); one editing pass, then rebuild dist. |
| D17 | `docs\spec\index.md:77` spec version 0.4.3a3 | Keep the spec on its own axis; bump only when spec content changes (note the axis explicitly in the file). |
| D18 | `src\app.py:223` FastAPI version "0.1.0-alpha" | Derive from `importlib.metadata.version("tn-proto-org")` — removes the literal forever. |
| D19 | `src\adapter_bundle.py:1562` agent_version default "0.4.3a1" | Derive from installed SDK version at bundle time; fallback literal 0.6.0a1. |
| D20 | `src\routes_docs.py:13-16` prod md-docs sourcing | Fix path to `tn_proto` for dev; ship docs into the image (or proxy GitHub) as a follow-up — currently dead everywhere. |
| D21 | Curated d.ts surface (`sdk_dts_bundle.py:70,364`) | Re-curate against 0.6.0a1 ts-sdk in the same pass as the vendor-bundle rebuild; verify `creds()` landed and drop the stale PR note. |
| D22 | KYE legacy (marketplace entry, `plugins\know-your-exhaust\`, README §6, mcp-add lines) | Retire: drop the marketplace entry, tombstone the tree with a pointer to tn-mcp-server, rewrite README §6 against the shipped server. |
| D23 | Rust crate versions 0.0.1 (5 Cargo.tomls) | Leave — internal, never published; bump tn-wasm's only at first npm ship. |
| D24 | `ts-sdk` `tn-wasm: file:` dep | Leave parked with the npm-publish track (bundle-into-SDK plan); not a 0.6.0a1 blocker since npm publish is gated off. |

# (c) Recommended fix-pass order

1. **Now, any branch (housekeeping):** R1 worktree deletions; settle D2-D8 with the owner (D2 gates the most files).
2. **Now, merge-independent — tn_proto_web (non-pin):** dead sibling paths (87-93), prose/domain seds (105-110, 113-114, 116-118), sdk_dts cosmetics (83, 86), `@tnproto/client` phantom (108). Do NOT touch pins (70-74) yet — they must keep resolving to tn-protocol 0.5.6a1 until the new wheels exist.
3. **Now, merge-independent — tn_skills (non-version):** prompts + manifest:174 + build.py:43 + plugin/README:72 + AGENTS.md (125-137), then `python plugin\build.py` rebuild (124); marketplace align (122) and manifest version bump (121) wait for D7 tag timing.
4. **On the unified post-merge line — tn_proto:** ALL tn_proto mechanical items (version bumps 1, 5-7; workflow fixes 14-18, 20 — release-typescript.yml:81 is the hard gate; runtime strings 22, 24-27; path fixes 28-33; README/docs 35-37, 43-49; crypto docs 50-59; bulk sed 64-69) + D2 outcome (2-4, 8-9) + D8 helper (21) + kafka rename (23) + CHANGELOG entry (12). Regenerate package-lock.
5. **Tag `v0.6.0a1`** → release-python publishes tn-proto + tn-btn + tn-core 0.6.0a1 to TestPyPI; confirm release-typescript goes green with the new glob.
6. **Post-publish dependents:** web pins (70-75) + Dockerfile companions (73) + deploy; vendor bundle + wasm rebuilds (101-104, D6/D21); notebooks pins + reruns (146-148, D15); verify every install claim flagged "verify at release" (item 111, llms.txt:7/159, skills README:295); rerun the 7-step verification gate from `tn_proto\docs\release-triage-2026-06-09.md:197-207` against the tn-proto artifacts (only step 3 is green today, and for the old name).
7. **tn-skills tag `v0.6.0a1`** (D7) → then the three `gh release download` refs (web item 112, skills item 139) + marketplace.json:12.
8. **Decision-gated parallel tracks, no ordering dependency:** D5 adapter migration, D11b extension domain PR, D9 regression-crawl pins, D22 KYE retirement, D12 stays deferred.

Rationale: tn_proto's bump must ride the unified post-merge line, and everything downstream (web pins, skills notebook pins, install-claim truth, the verification gate) is blocked on the first tn-proto/0.6.0a1 publish — but none of the web/skills NAME fixes are, so they land immediately; the only hard pre-tag gate is `release-typescript.yml:81`.
